Source: Windsurf Changelog
URL: https://windsurf.com/changelog
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Windsurf Changelog

## March 2026
- Mar 19 (v1.9577.43): Fixed Mac x64 build issues
- Mar 19 (v1.9577.42): Various stability and performance enhancements
- Mar 17: GPT-5.4 Mini now available at 1x credits (promotional pricing)
- Mar 12 (v1.9577.27): Fixed compatibility with Apple M5 processors
- Mar 9 (v1.9577.24): Cascade Jupyter Notebook performance enhancements, Diff Zone fixes, SKILL.md loading from .windsurf/skills/ directory, AGENTS.md fix, MCP system-level Skills via MDM for Enterprise, improved SSH/Remote performance, improved autocomplete error handling, agent panel crash fixes, improved Cascade UI rendering performance, improved notifications for model price changes, improved context management for MCP servers
- Mar 5: GPT-5.4 released with tiered reasoning pricing (No Reasoning 1x, Low 1x, Medium 2x, High 3x, Extra High 8x)

## February 2026
- Feb 26 (v1.9566.11): Extension installation fixes
- Feb 25 (v1.9566.9): New model picker with family grouping and reasoning toggles, Cascade hooks enhancements (POST_CASCADE_RESPONSE_WITH_TRANSCRIPT hook), MCP refresh/OAuth auto-trigger, Linux ARM64 support, VS Code 1.108 merge, windsurf.cascade.readClaudeCodeConfig flag
- Feb 21 (v1.9552.25): GitHub PR extension compatibility fix
- Feb 19: Gemini 3.1 Pro available (Low Thinking 0.5x, High Thinking 1x)
- Feb 17: Claude Sonnet 4.6 released (No thinking 2x, With thinking 3x); GLM-5 (0.75x) and Minimax M2.5 (0.25x) added; Windows self-update fix; macOS UI flickering fix (v1.9552.24)
- Feb 12 (v1.9552.21): Plan Mode auto-switching, Skills directory, Linux ARM64 full support, Cascade Hooks cloud config for enterprise
- Feb 4 (v1.9544.35): GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark in Arena Mode, Claude Opus 4.6 research preview

## January 2026
- Jan 30 (v1.9544.24): Wave 14 — Arena Mode, Plan Mode, Battle Groups, leaderboards
- Jan 27-16: GPT-5.2-Codex, Agent Skills, Windows Group Policy management

## December 2025
- Dec 27: Gemini 3 Flash
- Dec 24 (Wave 13): SWE-1.5 Free model, Git worktree support, Multi-Cascade panes, Cascade Dedicated Terminal (Beta), Cascade Hooks, System-level Rules/Workflows via MDM

## Key Models Available
GPT-5 series (including GPT-5.4 Mini, GPT-5.4, GPT-5.2-Codex, GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark), Claude Sonnet 4.5/4.6, Claude Opus 4.5/4.6, Gemini 2.5/3/3.1, SWE-1.5, DeepSeek, GLM-5, Minimax M2.5

## Deprecated/Removed Features
- Windsurf Browser: deprecated September 11, 2025
- Knowledge Base feature: removed
- Legacy Mode: removed (Write and Chat modes remain)
- Autocomplete setting: removed as legacy option
- Flow Action Credits pricing model: eliminated April 2025

## Enterprise Features
- Cloud configuration for Cascade Hooks
- Devin service key authentication
- Organization-wide allow/deny command lists for auto-execution
- System-level Skill definitions via MDM-managed configs
- Team conversation sharing (Teams/Enterprise SaaS)
- Windsurf Reviews GitHub app integration
- Knowledge base curation via Google Docs
- Netlify deployment integration
- Windows Group Policy management
